content.text:
The archived_at work is complete and the pull request is now open for review.

Over this session the migration to add the archived_at column was written and applied to the database, and the schema change was confirmed to have landed correctly against the local instance. The backfill populated existing rows as expected.

The relevant test module was then executed and all four tests passed cleanly, which gives good confidence that the backfill logic behaves as intended across the covered cases. Nothing surfaced as a regression in the surrounding suite.

With the implementation verified, the branch was pushed to the remote and a pull request was opened. The pull request is available at https://github.com/souliane/teatree/pull/318 and everything is green and ready to go, with no outstanding blockers at this time.
